data.title: feat: create worktrunk specialist skill
data.description:
Parent epic: #7

## Summary

Create `skills/worktrunk/SKILL.md` covering the full `wt` CLI for git worktree management.

## Scope

* All `wt` commands: create, open, list, merge, remove, switch, ship
* Project hooks (`.config/wt.toml`)
* User config (`~/.config/worktrunk/config.toml`)
* Integration with `Argcfile.sh` wt commands
* Branching model: worktree branch → PR to master

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `skills/worktrunk/SKILL.md` created
- [ ] Skill description triggers correctly for worktree-related queries
- [ ] Covers common workflows (create worktree, ship via PR, clean up)
